commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shared human-day helpers and applies configured user-timezone daily boundaries to session reset, session-memory artifacts, memory flush paths, usage summaries, tests, and changelog text.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: configure agents.defaults.userTimezone differently from the host timezone and compare daily reset, session-memory, and usage day boundaries; I did not run a live repro in this read-only review.
